fingerprint_string: Exclusively orders brass fasteners with corrosion-resistant finishes, showing strong preference for marine-grade hardware in medium quantities.
notable_patterns: Orders exclusively brass material - zero steel, stainless, or alloy orders across all 17 orders
Strong preference for corrosion-resistant finishes (zinc variants and HDG) comprising 85% of orders
Mixed metric/imperial usage suggests diverse application requirements or legacy equipment
Frequent washer orders (4 of 17 orders) indicate complete assembly procurement
